knowledge_changes: Roadmap spec now states active tasks/sprints must be checked before creating new work and related user intent should refine existing tasks instead of spawning duplicates.
Roadmap item contents now define additive concise refinement fields.
Compiler spec now says documentation loop should refine related active tasks and sprint scope before creating duplicate tasks.
API write rules now require task creation to check active work for related intent.
Adapter spec now requires guidance for agents to inspect/refine active tasks and sprints first.
roadmap_changes: TASK-065 covers code implementation of progressive task reuse/refinement.
assumptions: Simple deterministic matching over paths, labels, and intent text is enough for a first backend implementation; no embedding service is needed.
